cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

failures.message: row 1 parcel P37434 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 2 parcel P37479 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 3 parcel P76885 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.

action_plan: Return explicit low-quality evidence in selected columns or match_reasons so the row-level evaluator can verify it.
cases.next_action: Return explicit low-quality evidence in selected columns or match_reasons so the row-level evaluator can verify it.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_area AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
), low_quality_residential AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
), parcels_filtered AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
    AND (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
)
SELECT pf.parcel_number
FROM parcels_filtered pf
JOIN low_quality_residential lq ON pf.parcel_number = lq.parcel_number
ORDER BY pf.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Low Quality Residential Parcels 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (MSL) and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

generation_attempts.error: The query must read from allowed R2 parquet files with read_parquet().

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.situs_city_state_zip, a."Utilities" AS utilities
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND ps.acres > 1
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, larger than 1 acre, having utilities, and with zero improvements

action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.has_geometry, ps.improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND ps.acres > 0
    AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
    AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT (ps.land_use LIKE '%MH LEASED PROPERTY%')
    AND (ps.land_use LIKE '%RECREATION%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%VACANT%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%UNDEVELOPED%')
    AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CONDOMINIUM%'
    AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%PUBLIC%'
    AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CIVIC%'
    AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%OPEN SPACE%'
)
SELECT parcel_number, situs_address, situs_city_state_zip, owner_name, land_use, acres, city_name
FROM base
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley that are recreation or private vacant land, excluding mobile home leased property, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
